title: Make DIS response destination-aware
description: Require DIO/DIS destination local unicast or ff02::1a. Targeted unicast DIS may trigger immediate unicast DIO; multicast DIS resets Trickle and does not transmit immediately.
acceptance_criteria: Unicast DIS immediate response works; multicast DIS schedules via Trickle poll/send path without response storm; invalid destinations reject.
close_reason: Made DIS destination-aware: ff02::1a resets/starts Trickle with no immediate DIO, while targeted unicast DIS retains immediate unicast response. Added no-response/pending-Trickle and unicast-response assertions. Full node suite and strict scoped Clippy pass.
